textByHash.f189eae5b821d9fdd089274ac5dcc98bef5ebac6: What are you doing with that bag?
textByHash.7788e5d9edec3a020649d367dbc16f75b41433e4: Well hurry back. We need everyone at their posts.
textByHash.60e61ad47ef77b796472c4da7596a48f5ee59294: The one with the large bag? I thought I didn't recognise him, but then it's so hard to keep up. We get through guards so quickly around here for some reason...
textByHash.33400b44c92f6b2f80897dda089ab455810e8596: And risk a panic? No. Better we deal with this now while they're safe in the palace. Do you know how many bandits there are?
textByHash.1e8ed55cff0dbae9446abe25ddf82259f409899f: Right, we can work with that. You get out there and point them out. With them being disguised, you'll need to keep a close eye out for any guard who looks or acts differently to the others.
textByHash.2462f3d24c4fad262d8772356f92e068ecf93fb5: Don't go too far. If the bandits intend to attack the delegation, they'll either be here in the square or on the eastern road between the square and the bank.
textByHash.786815a73e3d3c78bc80144acf73f0b7ff1ad9ba: Return to me once you've found all four and we'll take them all at the same time.
textByHash.fd88d50dc5c2674a22201001d618565e69cfbf80: Get out there and point out the four bandits. They're in disguise, so be sure to keep a close eye out for any guard who looks or acts differently to the others.
textByHash.9a2c3f95008de7b5cb1c06ccc40e01fe445c99d1: Remember, if they intend to attack the delegation, they'll either be here in the square or on the eastern road between the square and the bank.
textByHash.bcca00be638f73fa28c2d774b4a2fe0c321e4a76: Are you sure? I definitely recognise at least one of them as one of my guards. Maybe you should try again.
textByHash.9d706d8809b9fcf3b407cc9200c4e75a810c5685: Good work. I'll signal my guards to bring them in...
textByHash.488e76c53d8a7fce1cd4d45232ab0c87663483ba: That could have ended up quite nasty if not for you. Once again, good work.
textByHash.4337ded4dff746ae3db2f704781c1a09ffa153a5: The bandits will be interrogated. If all goes well, we'll get some useful information out of them.
textByHash.6bc0f54390dc796b0519c7970d86a7968e8b33d7: Speaking of which... given it was you who found them in the first place, you might be able to offer some support. Would you be willing to help?
textByHash.88b91f9dfad9db54a0c127d21afc4d31292fc9f4: Come with me. We'll use the cell on the palace roof for the interrogations. It's nice and out of the way.
textByHash.4ac81d1fecfaba04068dff083318408658567cee: Prince Itzla! I... I'm sorry, but I wasn't expecting you here.
textByHash.919b61e5dc21fae5bb699c8513067d83e97c39a9: You're sure he told you everything?
textByHash.e62596e96839b5c2816deade837ad147c3a2d5bb: Oddly enough, no. This will be an interesting report to write. And on that note, I'd best get to it. All the best, adventurer. Thank you for your help.
textByHash.42f35791ecb9ee1d9dfbe679a6c0ccb4871425b0: Good to see you, adventurer. Hope everything is going well for you out there.
textByHash.57a47a63ff8a00bae525c43a40211aa46793134c: Glad to hear it. Did you end up travelling to Varlamore?
textByHash.ff6a777ea6735f2b66f9261702322b6384f4cb0e: Prince Itzla said that one of his people would meet you just outside the eastern gates. Might be worth heading over there.
